workPolicyExceptions: RustDesk public relay/API endpoints can require proxy routing; private/LAN destinations still hit private-address DIRECT rules before process rules.
notes: Use exact process names instead of broad PROCESS-NAME-REGEX patterns.
The list is intended for desktop-capable clients first.
Mobile package names are intentionally not included until each client path is verified.

unsupportedOrSkippedArtifacts.Shadowrocket: iOS app; no PROCESS-NAME support in this repo path.
unsupportedOrSkippedArtifacts.Loon: iOS app in this repo; no desktop artifact to receive process rules.
unsupportedOrSkippedArtifacts.Quantumult X: iOS app in this repo; no desktop artifact to receive process rules.
unsupportedOrSkippedArtifacts.Passwall: Router-side xray/sing-box shunt rules cannot see client process names.
unsupportedOrSkippedArtifacts.Passwall2: Router-side xray/sing-box shunt rules cannot see client process names.
unsupportedOrSkippedArtifacts.v2rayN(xray): This exported Xray routing JSON has no process-name field in its maintained schema.
